ocr.text: In the fiscal year 2024, the Equipment maintenance costs table details various equipment types, including MRI Machines with
120 units sold, totaling CHF2M, which incurred maintenance costs of CHF300K and repair costs of CHF150K, while
Ultrasound Devices, with 200 units sold, amounted to CHF1.5M in total costs, CHF200K in maintenance costs, and CHF100K
in repair costs. CT Scanners, with 80 units sold, had total costs of CHF1.2M, maintenance costs of CHF250K, and repair costs
of CHF120K.

The total units sold across all equipment types reached 400, with a total cost of CHF4.7M, maintenance costs of CHF750K, and
repair costs of CHF370K. The operational year 2024 reports total repairs of CHF1.5M, total maintenance of CHF750K, and an
average cost of CHF11.75K, with an average repair cost of CHF3.75K, a percentage of repairs at 31.9%, and a percentage of
maintenance at 15.9%, indicating an annual growth of 5%. The cost trend is stable, with projected costs of CHF5M and
projected growth of 6%, leading to an end-of-year estimate of CHF5.5M. The regional breakdown for Europe shows total
regions at 1, currency in CHF, and total equipment at 400, with a headcount of 150, 5 branches, total staff at 200, and 50
contractors.
